dialogue: Ah, looks like I took a wrong turn again...
I can't even solve this puzzle, maybe I should give up on the treasure.
WAH! It's you? How lucky!
I was ready to give up on the treasure hiding on this cursed tower...
But thanks to you I might just solve the puzzles blocking the way!
Would you please help me?
Woah! You made it look so easy!
Could you please help me with the other one too?
More puzzles? When is this tower going to end...
Together we can do it though!
I knew it! You've got what it takes to be a good treasure hunter haha!
You've been doing great so far!
Let's see how these puzzles go.
We're making good progress.
We're getting close to the top of the cursed tower.
And that means we're close to the treasure!
Nothing can resist you!
Puzzles again? When is this tower going to end?
Well, you've got this though, so it's alright
Piece of cake!
Oh... looks like we're close to the end.
The hardest puzzles are here...
Alright! Let's do it then!
Ha ha, you did it!
The treasure hiding in the tower... I knew it was worth solving all these puzzles.
A GIANT PILE OF SWEETS AND CHOCOLATES!
Don't eat too much though, or you'll be sick.
Thank you, my friend, with your help we got to the end of this tower.
I'll call you again if I go explore again... maybe there will be more chocolates!
